hero.subheadline: Transforming high-level advertising vision into meticulously crafted print reality. We are the architectural press for modern brands.

precision.title: The Precision Studio
precision.feature_1_body: Every campaign is treated as a blueprint. We don't just print; we engineer visual communication that feels substantial in the hand and impactful in the mind.
precision.feature_2_body: From large-format installations to bespoke stationery, our studio utilises the finest premium stocks and precise ink-layering techniques.

cta.body: Contact our consultants to discuss technical specs and strategy.

footer.tagline: Expert advertising strategy and precision print production studio.

services_page.description: From tactile print production to high-velocity digital campaigns, we bridge the gap between architectural precision and creative expression.

creative_campaigns.feature_2: Concept development to finished creative asset
creative_campaigns.feature_3: Campaign adaptation across all media formats

print_media.feature_3: Turnkey service — production to on-site installation

branding.title: Identity & Branding

branding.feature_1: Logo architecture and visual identity design
branding.feature_2: Brand guidelines covering typography, colour and layout
branding.feature_3: Multi-format asset production for print, digital and signage

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Standard orders complete in 10–14 business days. Express production (5–7 days) is available on request. Turnaround depends on material type, finish, and order volume — exact timelines are confirmed in every quote.
faq.q2: Do you handle design as well as print?
faq.a2: Yes. JM Publicidad offers end-to-end service: creative concept, graphic design, print production, and on-site installation. You can brief us from a rough idea or supply print-ready files.
faq.q3: What materials and finishes do you offer?
faq.a3: Our stock library includes imported Italian cotton papers, sustainable recycled stocks, luxury vinyls, UV-resistant outdoor laminates, anti-graffiti coatings, and Pantone-matched inks. Material recommendations are included in every quote.
faq.q4: Do you offer delivery and installation?
faq.a4: Yes. We offer a turnkey service from production to on-site installation — managing logistics, site surveys, and installation for signage, vehicle branding, and large-format displays across Spain.
faq.a5: No minimum order. We produce single bespoke pieces and high-volume runs alike. Pricing scales with quantity — contact us for a tailored quote.
faq.q6: Which areas of Spain do you serve?
faq.a6: Our studio is based in Madrid's Design District. We serve clients across Spain and coordinate national installations. International projects are accepted on request.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: A curated collection of architectural advertising and precision print productions from our studio to the world.
portfolio.format_range_value: Business cards to 48-sheet billboards. Precision sizing for every medium.
portfolio.ink_systems_value: Pantone matching, soy-based inks, and UV-resistant outdoor finishes.
portfolio.stock_library_value: Imported Italian cotton papers, sustainable recycled stocks, and luxury vinyls.
portfolio.t1_quote: "JM Publicidad doesn't just print designs; they understand the architectural soul of our brand. The tactile quality is unmatched."
portfolio.t2_quote: "Their attention to detail on the Copper Series was phenomenal. The precision in the foil stamping is the best in the city."
